[Home](./index.md) &gt; [openrct2-flexui](./openrct2-flexui.md) &gt; [ViewportParams](./openrct2-flexui.viewportparams.md) &gt; [zoom](./openrct2-flexui.viewportparams.zoom.md)

## ViewportParams.zoom property

The zoom-level to set it to. Available zoom levels are 0 to 3 on all drawing engines. On OpenGL -1 and -2 are also available, which equal to 0 on other drawing engines.

**Signature:**

```typescript
zoom?: Bindable<number>;
```
